2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag, VM_UFFD_RWP, to enable userfaultfd read-write protection (RWP). RWP extends the existing write-protection mechanism to also trap read accesses through userfaultfd. The flag is only meaningful when both PAGE_NONE and uffd PTE bit primitives exist. A Kconfig symbol, CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP, is introduced to auto-select this feature when certain conditions are met. The patch includes changes to various kernel files to add support for the new flag and its associated functionality.
